lifting_anchor.description: A component that adds lifting anchors to walls according to predefined rules

mesh_bars.description: A component that creates main reinforcement for concrete slabs or walls

TopAsBott.description: top bars use bottom bar properties: 0 = yes, 1 = no

DefineSecBott.description: bottom secondary bars use bottom primary bar properties: 0 = no, 1 = yes

DefineSecTop.description: top secondary bars use bottom primary bar properties: 0 = no, 1 = yes

SpacTypBotSec.description: spacing mode for bottom secondary rebars: 0 = by spacing, 1 = by number of bars, 2 = by exact spacings

SpacTypBotPri.description: spacing mode for bottom primary rebars: 0 = by spacing, 1 = by number of bars, 2 = by exact spacings

SpacTypTopSec.description: spacing mode for top secondary rebars: 0 = by spacing, 1 = by number of bars, 2 = by exact spacings

SpacTypTopPri.description: spacing mode for top primary rebars: 0 = by spacing, 1 = by number of bars, 2 = by exact spacings

BarTypeBott.description: bottom bars creation type: 1 = bar group, 0 = mesh

BarTypeTop.description: top bars creation type: 1 = bar group, 0 = mesh

BottomDistance.description: concrete cover thickness for the bottom layer

TopDistance.description: concrete cover thickness for the top layer

BottRebars.description: bottom bars placement: 1 = secondary above primary, 0 = primary above secondary

TopRebars.description: top bars placement: 1 = secondary above primary, 0 = primary above secondary

PrimaryBarDir.description: the direction of the primary bars: 0 = auto (along the two longest parallel sides of a slab), 1 = along slab x direction, 2 = along slab y direction, 3 = along global x direction, 4 = along global y direction, 5 = by direct modification error (90 degree angle), 6 = by direct modification error (flexible angle)

UpDirection.description: defines which side of the slab is treated as the top: 0 = the side with the greatest area, 1 = -z direction, 2 = +z direction, 3 = -y direction, 4 = +y direction, 5 = -x direction, 6 = +x direction

GridOption.description: distribution of bars that are created as bar groups: 0 = without grid, 1 = by grid

MinRebarLength.description: minimum length of primary bar to be created

MinRebarLengthSec.description: minimum length of secondary bar to be created

DistanceType.description: how the distances between the bars are measured: 0 = from center of bar, 1 = from edge of bar

OverhangType.description: whether the distances between the bars are the same or different: 0 = same for top and bottom, 1 = different for top and bottom

OverhangPrimStart.description: without grid: top overhang for the start of the primary bars

OverhangPrimBotStart.description: without grid: bottom overhang for the start of the primary bars

OverhangPrimEnd.description: without grid: top overhang for the end of the primary bars

OverhangPrimBotEnd.description: without grid: bottom overhang for the end of the primary bars

OverhangSecStart.description: without grid: overhang for the start of the secondary bars

OverhangSecBotStart.description: without grid: bottom overhang for the start of the secondary bars

OverhangSecEnd.description: without grid: top overhang for the end of the secondary bars

OverhangSecBotEnd.description: without grid: bottom overhang for the end of the secondary bars

MinOverhangStartL.description: by grid: minimum overhang for the start of the longitudinal bars

MinOverhangEndL.description: by grid: minimum overhang for the end of the longitudinal bars

MinSpaceLong.description: by grid: minimum spacing for the longitudinal bars

MinOverhangStartC.description: by grid: minimum overhang for the start of the crossing bars

MinOverhangEndC.description: by grid: minimum overhang for the end of the crossing bars

MinSpaceCross.description: by grid: minimum spacing for the crossing bars

GroupTapered.description: whether tapered bars are grouped: 0 = yes, 1 = no

RoundTolerance.description: maximum allowed shortening of tapered bars

TaperedGroup.description: how the bars along the tapered edge are handled: 0 = normally, 1 = create as many bars as possible with same length

CuttingBars.description: how bars next to openings are handled: 0 = cut bars, 1 = ignore cuts, 2 = ignore cuts by name, 3 = ignore cuts by class, 4 = ignore cuts by filter

CutNameFilter.description: ignore cuts by specified part name

CutClassFilter.description: ignore cuts by specified part class

CutObjFilter.description: ignore cuts by specified selection filter

DoorSize.description: ignore door openings smaller than this value

CoverDoor.description: concrete cover thickness between the bar to the edge of the door opening

OpenSize.description: ignore window openings smaller than this value

CoverHole.description: concrete cover thickness between the bar to the edge of the window opening

CutBarsForParts.description: whether the bars are cut by the parts that clash with the reinforced part: 0 = yes, 1 = no

EmbedFilter.description: selection filter for cutting parts around which cuts have to be created

SupportBars.description: whether additional support bars are created for the loose bars in the mesh: 0 = no, 1 = yes, without extended support bars, 2 = yes, with extended support bars

Overlap.description: overlap length for the support bars

SupportBarsXY.description: which support bars are created: 0 = both, 1 = primary only, 2 = secondary only

CoverType.description: whether concrete cover thickness on sides is different: 0 = same all sides, 1 = different each side

CreateHooks.description: whether the same bar end conditions are used around the openings as at part edges: 0 = yes, 1 = no

CutByNeighbor.description: whether the bars that protrude from the selected concrete parts are cut at the openings of neighbor parts: 0 = no, 1 = yes

CoverForNeighbor.description: concrete cover thickness for neighbor parts

BottSecClass.description: Tekla class of the bottom secondary bars

TopSecClass.description: Tekla class of the top secondary bars

BottPriClass.description: Tekla class of the bottom primary bars

TopPriClass.description: Tekla class of the top primary bars

BottSecName.description: name of the bottom secondary bars

TopSecName.description: name of the top secondary bars

BottPriName.description: name of the bottom primary bars

TopPriName.description: name of the top primary bars

BottSecStart.description: start number for the bottom secondary bars

TopSecStart.description: start number for the top secondary bars

BottPriStart.description: start number for the bottom primary bars

TopPriStart.description: start number for the top primary bars

BottSecPrefix.description: prefix for the bottom secondary bars

TopSecPrefix.description: prefix for the top secondary bars

BottPriPrefix.description: prefix for the bottom primary bars

TopPriPrefix.description: prefix for the top primary bars

CreateAssembly.description: create all reinforcement as one rebar assembly: 0 = no, 1 = yes

AssTypeTop.description: rebar assembly type for the top bars: 0 = default, 1 = cage, 2 = mesh, 3 = bent mesh, 4 = braced girder, 5 = embed, 6 = roll mat

AssNameTop.description: rebar assembly name for the top bars

AssPrefixTop.description: rebar assembly prefix for the top bars

AssNumTop.description: rebar assembly start number for the top bars

AssTypeBot.description: rebar assembly type for the bottom bars: 0 = default, 1 = cage, 2 = mesh, 3 = bent mesh, 4 = braced girder, 5 = embed, 6 = roll mat

AssNameBot.description: rebar assembly name for the bottom bars

AssPrefixBot.description: rebar assembly prefix for the bottom bars

AssNumBot.description: rebar assembly start number for the bottom bars

edge_and_corner.description: A component that creates edge and corner reinforcement for concrete slabs or walls

Picture_CornerBotRight.description: bottom right corner: 0 = bottom and side bars continuous around corner with L-shaped overlap, 1 = straight bottom bars, bent side bars, 2 = straight side bars, bent bottom bars

Picture_CornerBotLeft.description: bottom left corner: 0 = bottom and side bars continuous around corner with L-shaped overlap, 1 = straight bottom bars, bent side bars, 2 = straight side bars, bent bottom bars

Picture_CornerTopRight.description: top right corner: 0 = top and side bars continuous around corner with L-shaped overlap, 1 = straight top bars, bent side bars, 2 = straight side bars, bent top bars

Picture_CornerTopLeft.description: top left corner: 0 = top and side bars continuous around corner with L-shaped overlap, 1 = straight top bars, bent side bars, 2 = straight side bars, bent top bars

Picture_CornerInside.description: diagonal corner bars are created to an opening: 0 = yes, 1 = no

Picture_CutOut.description: creation of edge bars near cutouts: 0 = do not create, 1 = create above the cutout for the defined length, 2 = create above the cutout, 3 = create to the cutout

Picture_ReinforceOpenings.description: reinforce openings: 0 = only edges are reinforced, 1 = edges and openings are reinforced, 2 = only openings are reinforced

P_MaxBlockOut.description: minimum cutout size required for creating edge, corner and diagonal bars reinforcement

Picture_MaxCornerCutOut.description: creation of edge bars near corner cutouts: 0 = both edge bars are bent, 1 = both edge bars and U bars are moved from the cutout, 2 = no bars are moved, edge bars are created as if no cutout exists

P_MaxCornerCutOut.description: minimum cutout size required for creating corner reinforcement

P_MinHoleSize.description: minimum hole size required for creating reinforcement around holes

EB_StartNo.description: start number for the edge bars

EB_Radius.description: bending radius of the edge bars

EB_Class.description: Tekla class of the edge bars

EB_L1.description: L1 - bent edge bars overlapping length

EB_L2.description: L2 - overlapping length for L-shaped bars in vertical direction

EB_L3.description: L3 - overlapping length for L-shaped bars in horizontal direction

EB_L4.description: L4 - anchoring length of the vertical edge bars in the inner corner

EB_L5.description: L5 - anchoring length of the horizontal edge bars in the inner corner

EB_BarsNumber.description: number of edge bars in the reinforcing bar group

EB_CreateAsGroup.description: create identical edge bars as a group: -2147483648 = default (yes), 0 = no, 1 = yes

EB_C1.description: C1 - top concrete cover thickness for edge bars

EB_C2.description: C2 - bottom concrete cover thickness for edge bars

EB_C3.description: C3 - side concrete cover thickness for edge bars

minLength.description: minimum length of the edge bars

edgeBarNextOpt.description: create additional secondary edge bars, 0 = no, 1 = yes

DB_StartNo.description: start number for the diagonal bars

DB_Class.description: Tekla class of the diagonal bars

DB_L1.description: L1 - top overlapping length for diagonal bars

DB_L2.description: L2 - bottom overlapping length for diagonal bars

DB_BarsNumber.description: number of diagonal bars in the reinforcing bar group

DB_CreateAsGroup.description: create identical diagonal bars as a group: -2147483648 = default (yes), 0 = no, 1 = yes

DB_C1.description: C1 - top concrete cover thickness for diagonal bars

DB_C2.description: C2 - bottom concrete cover thickness for diagonal bars

DB_C3.description: C3 - concrete cover thickness from corner to the diagonal bars

DB_C4.description: C4 - concrete cover thickness from element edge to the diagonal bars

Create_U_bar.description: create horizontal U-bars: -2147483648 = default (no), 0 = no, 1 = yes

UB_StartNo.description: start number for the horizontal U-bars

UB_Class.description: Tekla class of the horizontal U-bars

UB_Radius.description: bending radius of the horizontal U-bars

UB_CoverBottom.description: bottom concrete cover thickness for the horizontal U-bars

UB_CoverTop.description: top concrete cover thickness for the horizontal U-bars

UB_CoverSide.description: side concrete cover thickness for the horizontal U-bars

UB_L1.description: L1 - horizontal U-bars bottom leg length

UB_L2.description: L2 - horizontal U-bars top leg length

minCut.description: minimum cut size required for creating horizontal U-bars around

UB_CM_H.description: horizontal U-bars creation method: -2147483648 = default, 0 = equal distribution by number, 1 = equal distribution by target spacing, 2 = by exact spacing with flexible first space, 3 = by exact spacing with flexible last space, 4 = by exact spacing with flexible middle space, 5 = by exact spacing with flexible first and last space, 6 = by exact spacing values

UB_TargetSpacing_H.description: target spacing values for horizontal U-bars

UB_ExactSpacing_H.description: exact spacing value between horizontal U-bars

UB_C3.description: horizontal U-bar distance from the panel or the slab end

stirrupsType.description: stirrups to be created instead of horizontal U-bars in case of small distance between the the edges: 0 = with 135-degree hooks, 1 = with 90-degree hooks, 2 - open stirrups

Create_U_bar_V.description: create vertical U-bars: -2147483648 = default (no), 0 = no, 1 = yes, 2 = same as horizontal U-bars and inside, 3 = same as horizontal U-bars and outside

UB_StartNo_V.description: start number for the vertical U-bars

UB_Class_V.description: Tekla class of the vertical U-bars

UB_Radius_V.description: bending radius of the vertical U-bars

UB_CoverBottom_V.description: bottom concrete cover thickness for the vertical U-bars

UB_CoverTop_V.description: top concrete cover thickness for the vertical U-bars

UB_CoverSide_V.description: side concrete cover thickness for the vertical U-bars

UB_L1_V.description: L1 - vertical U-bars bottom leg length

UB_L2_V.description: L2 - vertical U-bars top leg length

minCut_V.description: minimum cut size required for creating vertical U-bars around

UB_CM_V.description: vertical U-bars creation method: -2147483648 = default, 0 = equal distribution by number, 1 = equal distribution by target spacing, 2 = by exact spacing with flexible first space, 3 = by exact spacing with flexible last space, 4 = by exact spacing with flexible middle space, 5 = by exact spacing with flexible first and last space, 6 = by exact spacing values

UB_TargetSpacing_V.description: target spacing values for vertical U-bars

UB_ExactSpacing_V.description: exact spacing value between vertical U-bars

UB_C3_V.description: vertical U-bar distance from the panel or the slab end

stirrupsType_V.description: stirrups to be created instead of vertical U-bars in case of small distance between the the edges: 0 = with 135-degree hooks, 1 = with 90-degree hooks, 2 - open stirrups
